---
title: "fl1"
format: html
editor: visual
---
#install packages
```{r}
install.packages(c("tidyverse", "readxl", "janitor", "here"))
install.packages(c("cars", "effectsize", "rstatix"))
```


#packages
```{r}
#| message: false
# general use
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(car) # levene test
library(effectsize) # assess effect size 
library(rstatix) # anova, kruskal wallis
```

#Read  
```{r}
fl1_june <- read_xlsx(path = here("data", 
                        "June 2026 Firebreak Data - Aidan.xlsx",
                        sheet = "FL1"))
```
